description: Alice tells a narrative anecdote about a bad meeting from five years ago. The meeting is a past event in a story, not a scheduling request. No present or future events are being scheduled.

mock_llm_response.summary: No actionable calendar events found. The conversation is a narrative anecdote about a past meeting from approximately five years ago. The Monday morning all-hands is part of a story, not a scheduling request. All temporal references are historical.

notes: Narrative storytelling trap. The Monday morning all-hands mentioned in the story happened years ago and is framed explicitly as a past memory. The model must distinguish between events that appear in narratives/anecdotes and actual scheduling intents.
